prompt: Give me a short pep talk before I start a hard task I have been putting off all morning.
response:
# You've Got This!

Hey there! I know that task has been looming over you all morning, and starting is often the hardest part. But guess what? You're stronger than your procrastination. This difficult task is just waiting to become your next accomplishment.

Take a deep breath. Break it down into smaller steps if needed. Remember, you don't have to do it perfectly - you just need to begin. Every minute you spend working on it is progress.

You've tackled tough challenges before, and you'll conquer this one too. Your future self will thank you for starting now.

Time to turn "I'll do it later" into "I did it!" I believe in you - now go show that task who's boss!
